key_findings: Oversampled training recipe (CFR/heuristic 3x) is the primary driver: CFR improved from -0.194 (v1) to +0.044 (v2a)
State-conditioned gate (v2b) does not learn state-selective gating; all gates ~0.51-0.58 with low variance
Ungated v2a beats gated v2b on avg (+0.619 vs +0.596); gated v2b has marginally better robustness (-0.284 vs -0.303)
Tight_passive and tight_aggressive remain well below baseline — cold-start still dominates for slow-signal opponents
Both variants clear secondary success criterion: beat v1_a_td avg by >= 0.03 chips/round
recommended_next: opp_stats_modulation_v3 — EV-variance-weighted TD loss to inject state-sensitivity signal into gradients
